explanation: This command uses obfuscation techniques similar to the Sigma rule by setting an environment variable with a PowerShell command and invoking it. It leverages string concatenation and command-line syntax variations to mimic the behavior described in the rule.
This command simulates the same behavior by using a different casing for CMD.EXE and POWERSHELL.EXE and inserting spaces and quotes to obfuscate the command structure.
This command uses minimal syntax and no obfuscation beyond basic command structure to simulate a benign-looking command that still matches the Sigma rule's pattern.
